+def load_single_model(checkpoint_path, device):

+    checkpoint = torch.load(checkpoint_path, map_location=device)

+    backbone = checkpoint.get('backbone', 'clip_vitb16')

+    num_classes = checkpoint.get('num_classes', 10)

+    use_dann = checkpoint.get('use_dann', False)

+    dropout = checkpoint.get('dropout', 0.3)

+    model = get_model(backbone=backbone, num_classes=num_classes, pretrained=False,

+                      use_dann=use_dann, dropout=dropout)

+    model.load_state_dict(checkpoint['model_state_dict'])

+    model = model.to(device)

+    model.eval()

+    return model, backbone

+

+

 def main():

     args = parse_args()

     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

+    # Support comma-separated list of checkpoints for ensemble

+    ckpt_paths = [p.strip() for p in args.checkpoint.split(',')]

+    models = []

+    backbone = None

+    for ckpt in ckpt_paths:

+        model, bk = load_single_model(ckpt, device)

+        models.append(model)

+        if backbone is None:

+            backbone = bk
